prompt: Ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial studio portrait of a young woman standing centered in frame, full-body view, facing directly toward the camera with a calm, serious, slightly intimidating expression and intense eye contact. Powerful diffused backlight creates a luminous halo around the hair and shoulders, combined with soft frontal fill lighting that preserves facial details while maintaining gentle shadows. Cool monochromatic color grading, subtle contrast, cinematic mood, Scandinavian minimalism, luxury streetwear campaign aesthetic. Professional fashion photography, medium-format camera, 85mm lens, eye-level angle, symmetrical composition, full-body framing, vertical portrait orientation (9:16), ultra-sharp focus on eyes, detailed hair strands, realistic fabric folds and textures, natural skin pores, HDR, premium editorial retouching, luxury magazine cover quality, photorealistic, hyperrealistic, 8K resolution, fashion lookbook, contemporary cyber-minimalist aesthetic.
